title: Ubiquiti UniFi Device Bridge Pro - wireless bridge with PoE In/Out, 5GHz
description: This 5 GHz wireless bridge allows for point-to-point connection to another Bridge Pro device or seamless uplink using the UniFi Wi-Fi Auto-Link feature. It has two GbE RJ-45 ports, one of which supports PoE output for powering additional PoE devices. The device is powered via PoE/PoE+ and is designed for outdoor installations with resistance to weather conditions ( IPX6 ) Support for point-to-point connections Uplink capability with UniFi Wi-Fi Auto-Link 2 Gigabit Ethernet ports ( PoE+ input is required for PoE passthrough, 30W injector ) Powered by PoE/PoE+ (PoE adapter is included) Maximum throughput of 867 Mbps in the 5 GHz band Integrated 2x2 MIMO antenna with 19 dBi gain Weather resistance (IPX6), suitable for outdoor installation Option for pole mounting (mounting adapter included) Supports Wi-Fi standards 802.11a/n/ac with WPA2 AES security The device cannot be set up independently and must be managed using the UniFi console , official UniFi hosting , or a UniFi Network Server with self-hosting Device Power cable Mounting accessories PoE injector (48 V / 0.32 A)
specsSearch: Wireless features Frequency range [MHz] 5150 - 5850 Maximum modulation 256 QAM Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 25 Security WPA2 AES 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 1 Antenna gain [dBi] 19 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 42 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Protection class IPX6 Purpose Outdoor Material Polycarbonate Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 430 Width [mm] 64 Height [mm] 190
